questions.question_text: You are Usha Rani, Sports Secretary of the Tagore Public School, Ahmedabad. Write a notice inviting the names of the participants willing to take part in the Annual Sports Meet, giving all the necessary information, i.e. the date and venue.
You are Ashok Gupta, Secretary of your school. Your school is going to hold Drama Competition next week. All those students who are interested to participate should give names to the undersigned.
As a Head Boy/Girl draft a notice for your school notice board about an inter-house poetry recitation competition to be held in school. You are Pooja/Praveen.

You are Vijay/Vijaya, the Head boy/Head girl of Vivekanand Public School, Greater Noida. Your school has decided to hold a fete in the school playground. The Principal has asked you to write a notice about this fete inviting the students and the teachers to participate in it.

You are the President of the cultural society of your school. You are planning to organize a cultural program. Write a notice for the school notice board inviting names of students to participate. Sign yourself as Kashish of ABC School, Delhi.

Tapan Ghosh of Class VIII A is the Secretary of the Holy Christ School Geography Forum. The geography teacher has asked Tapan to put up a notice to invite the students of geography to participate in the Geography Quiz Contest to be held after a fortnight in St Anthony's School The first prize carries ₹1000 and a Trophy. Write this notice, using not more than 50 words.
Write a notice for the school Notice Board informing students about the school tour to Mysore. You are Rakesh Sharma (Tour Incharge) of your school.
You are Kiran/Kabir, School Captain of Sumer Model School, Rohtak. Write a notice informing the students about a debate competition to be held on 25th September.
You are Abhaya, the Sports Captain of D.A.V. Model School. Write a notice in 50 words for the school noticeboard informing the students about the interschool basketball match to be played.
You are Kiran, School Captain of Kabir Model School, Rohtak. Write a notice informing the students about a debate competition to be held on 25th September.

The school has decided to hold a fete in the school playground. The Principal has asked you to write, as the Headboy/Headgirl of the school, a notice about this fete, inviting the students and the teachers to participate in it. The notice should include all necessary details. Write this notice in about 50 words.

Your school is organizing an Inter School Cricket Match series. As Sports Captain of your school, draft a notice for your school notice board asking the members of the school cricket team to prepare themselves for the same. Invent necessary details and sign yourself as Rahul Kumar, Sports Captain of Raj Public School, Jhansi.

You are the Cultural Secretary of your school You have been asked to inform students of Classes VI to VIII about an Inter-School Dramatics Competition. Draft a notice in about 50 words to be put up on the school notice board, with all necessary details.

You are Ramesh, the editor of the school magazine, and want to hold an interclass competition to collect poems and cartoons for the magazine before 30th Sept. Draft a notice for the students' notice board inviting entries. Mention all details required like entry dates, prizes etc. Give your notice an appealing heading.
Suppose you have found somebody's wrist watch in your classroom. Write a notice to be put up on the School Notice board to find the owner of the watch. You are Dilip/ Deeksha.

You are Raman/Rama, the head boy/girl of Aurobindo School, Dehradun. Your school is organising a tour to Rajasthan. Write a notice inviting students who want to join the tour. Put the notice in the box.
As a secretary of Adventure Club of Progressive school, Sonipat. Write a notice for your school Notice Board informed about the educational tour to Rajasthan for students of IX to XII std.

You are Raman/Rama, the head boy/girl of Aurobindo School, Dehradun. Your school is organizing a tour to Rajasthan. Draft a notice inviting students who want to join the tour. Put the notice in the box.

Your school is going to celebrate the Sports Day in the school premises. As a sports captain write a notice inviting names of interested students for various games. Mention dates of selection of students. You are Rohit.

You are Jagdish, the editor of the school magazine, and want to hold an interclass competition to collect poems and cartoons for the magazine before 20th October 2019. Draft a notice for the students' notice board inviting entries. Mention all details required like entry dates, prizes, etc. Give your notice an appealing heading.

Mukul Swami of class X, Captain of the School Hockey Team and Sports Secretary, is asked by his sports teacher to put a notice on the school notice board inviting the students to buy some old hockey sticks and balls. These items are in a fairly good condition. Write this notice using not more than 50 words.
Suppose you are Shashi Joshi of Class VIII studying in Springfield Public School, Jamshedpur. You have lost a bag of books during the lunch break. Write a notice for the School Noticeboard.

Meenakshi Goel is the Sports Captain of Navodaya School. The sports day is to be held on October 18 which is just two weeks away. She has to inform the house captains that they have to submit the names of the participants to her in a week's time. A student cannot take part in more than three events excluding the relay. Any delay or wrong information will lead to disqualification of the student. Write the notice assuming yourself Meenakshi using not more than 50 words.

Your school has decided to present a programme on the AIR from the AIR Stadium in your city, in the popular programme Meet the Young-Artists.
Write a notice in not more than 50 words for your school notice-board inviting talented students to appear for trial for different items on 20th November in the School's "Open Theatre". You have invited Mr. Anand Bosle, the famous Presenter on the AIR. You are the Secretary, Cultural Activities Society. The school Principal has accorded his permission for the broadcast.

Vikram Kumar of class IX-A is the Secretary of the Holy Christ School Geography Forum. The geography teacher has asked Tapan to put up a notice to invite the students of geography to participate in the Geography Quiz Contest to be held after a fortnight in St. Anthony's School. The first prize carries 1000 and a Trophy. Write this notice, using not more than 30 words. Try to make the notice catch all the students' attention.

You are the President of the Students' Council of St. Francis Sr Secondary School, Agra. You have invited a visiting Russian Ballet Troupe to give a performance in your school on the occasion of its Golden Jubilee celebrations. Write a notice, informing the students about this event. Sign yourself as Raman Arora/Ria Arora.

You are Nikhil, the Head Boy of Chandigarh Public School, Chandigarh. Write a notice on behalf of your school inviting all the grandparents of the students of your school to celebrate World Elders' Day.

You are Vijay/Vijaya, the Head boy/Head girl of Vivekanand Public School, Greater Noida. Your school has decided to hold a fete in the school playground. The principal has asked you to write a notice about this fete inviting the students and the teachers to participate in it.
You are Rohan, incharge of admission at SD Public School, New Delhi. Draft a notice about registration for admission to classes 1st to IXth for the school's notice board.

Meenakshi Goel is the sports captain of Navodaya school. The sports day is to be held on September 21st which is just two weeks away. She has to inform the house captains that they have to submit the names of the participants to her in a week's time. A student cannot take part in more than three events excluding the relay. Any delay or wrong information will lead to disqualification of the student.
Write the notice for Meenakshi using not more than 40 words.

Mukul Swami of class X, Captain of the School Hockey Team and Sports Secretary, is asked by his sports teacher to put a notice on the school notice board inviting the students to buy some old hockey sticks and balls. These items are in a fairly good condition. Write this notice using not more than 30 words. Try to make the notice catch students' attention.
You are Abhay, the Sports Captain of D.A.V. Model School, Ghaziabad. Write a notice in 50 words for the school notice board informing the students about the interschool basketball match to be played.
You are Nikhil, the Head Boy of Carmel Public School, Chandigarh. Write a notice on behalf of your school inviting all the grandparents of the students of your school to celebrate Grandparents Day.
You are Sarika Gupta, Librarian of Tagore Public School, Raipur. Draft a notice for students and staff to return the library book before the session ending examination beginning next week.
